alerts.title: Iran threatens complete halt to negotiations after reciprocal strikes continue
alerts.summary: On 30 June, both US and Iran conducted additional strikes despite ceasefire agreement; Iran attacked commercial shipping near Strait of Hormuz while CENTCOM struck multiple Iranian targets. Iranian FM Araghchi has threatened complete halt to Baghdad talks, hardening demands for full Iranian control over Hormuz and exclusion of foreign military presence. Nuclear breakout window remains 1-2 weeks. Sources: incidents (CENTCOM, PBS, NBC, BBC, AP, CBS), global_metrics (threat level 9/10 CRITICAL).
alerts.region: Persian Gulf, Strait of Hormuz, Iran

alerts.title: US conditions Iranian fund unfreezing on nuclear file progress despite agreed talks framework
alerts.summary: US State Department reaffirmed it will not unfreeze frozen Iranian assets unless concrete progress materializes on nuclear enrichment restrictions, contradicting earlier agreement that nuclear issues would not be discussed at this negotiation phase. Iran currently maintaining 60% U-235 enrichment with estimated 1-2 week breakout window. Represents significant shift in US negotiating position mid-talks. Sources: telegram (ME Spectator, 29 June), global_metrics (nuclear headlines).

alerts.title: Israel expands multi-sector operations across Gaza, Lebanon, Syria despite ceasefire
alerts.summary: IDF conducted coordinated airstrikes on 30 June across southern Syria (civilian evacuations reported), Gaza central zone (8+ killed including 2 children per NBC), and southern Lebanon border (large explosion reported by Al Jazeera). Operations continue independent of US-Iran ceasefire negotiations. Hezbollah publicly condemned new ceasefire arrangement. Sources: incidents (Al Jazeera, BBC, Reuters, NBC, Religion News Service, Times of Israel).

alerts.title: Ukrainian forces conduct major drone strike on Russian territory; 419 drones intercepted across 21 regions
alerts.summary: Ukrainian formations executed massed attack on Russian territory overnight 29-30 June, deploying 419+ unmanned aerial vehicles across 21 regions. Moscow region targeted with significant drone penetration; partial drone strike reported on private residence in Egorievsk killing six-month-old child en route to hospital; Dubna space communications facility reportedly struck. Represents sustained Ukrainian deep-strike capability despite active conflict. Sources: telegram (Rybar, 30 June, ~146K views).

alerts.title: US domestic sentiment shifts sharply toward Trump amid Supreme Court rulings on citizenship
alerts.summary: US sentiment analysis shows positive sentiment rising to 58% with dramatic surge in Trump-related keywords (54 mentions) and Supreme Court/birthright citizenship terms (37 mentions each) in past 24 hours. Represents significant domestic political realignment amid ongoing Iran conflict. Term 'Trump' now dominant discourse driver in US OSINT feeds, outpacing Iran/military keywords. Sources: sentiment (VADER analysis, top words analysis).

analysis_note: Ceasefire framework collapsing as reciprocal US-Iran strikes resume, nuclear negotiations stall over fund-release conditionality, Israeli operations expand across three fronts, Ukrainian deep-strike capability sustains high tempo, and US domestic political realignment accelerates amid crisis.
